name: netrc-creds
description: Set up netrc creds in Github Actions

scripts.version: npm run build && releasearoni version --add dist
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && esbuild index.js --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=esm --sourcemap=external --outdir=dist "--banner:js=import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"

author: Bret Comnes <bcomnes@gmail.com> (https://bret.io/)
